name: AMERICAN PUBLIC EDUCATION INC
business: American Public Education, Inc. provides online and campus-based postsecondary education to approximately 108,600 students through three subsidiary institutions: American Public University System (APUS), Rasmussen University (RU), and Hondros College of Nursing (HCN). APUS is the number one educator of active-duty military and of veterans, while RU and HCN are national leaders in pre-licensure nursing education.

exposures.sentence: We are the number one educator of active-duty military and of veterans through American Public University System.

We are a national leader in pre-licensure nursing education, focused on a Diploma in Practical Nursing, or PN diploma, and an Associate Degree in Nursing, or ADN, through Rasmussen University and Hondros College of Nursing.
APUS is exclusively an online institution of higher learning, purpose-built to meet the needs of the communities it serves.

catalysts.event: HLC approval of continuation of accreditation after legal entity merger
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, HLC approved the continuation of accreditation of APUS and RU after the legal entity merger with an acknowledgment that the intent is to eventually consolidate the three institutions into one HLC accreditation.

On March 2, 2026, we completed the merger of the legal entities that own and operate APUS, RU, and HCN, with the APUS entity surviving the merger, and subsequently notified ED that the merger occurred and resulted in RU and HCN being directly owned by the same legal entity that directly owns APUS.

catalysts.event: Expected completion of step two of the Combination (institutional consolidation)
catalysts.sentence: We currently expect to complete the implementation of step two of the Combination in the third quarter of 2026, subject to obtaining required approvals.

catalysts.event: APUS tuition increase for non-military students
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, APUS implemented a modest tuition increase for non-military undergraduate and graduate students.

catalysts.event: RU tuition increase planned for all students
catalysts.sentence: In October 2026, RU plans to implement a modest tuition increase for all students.

catalysts.event: ED release of RU from temporary growth restrictions
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, ED released RU from temporary growth restrictions imposed in connection with RU's 2019 change in ownership.

catalysts.event: HCN migration to new student information system (SIS) platform planned to begin
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we plan to begin migrating HCN to a new SIS platform as part of our broader strategy to reduce fragmentation and complexity across student information systems.

catalysts.event: RU transition from Blackboard Ultra to D2L learning management system planned
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, we plan to transition RU from Blackboard Ultra to D2L to consolidate our LMS environment across our institutions, which we expect will reduce operational complexity and support a more consistent academic experience.

tamClaims.claim: Projected employment growth for licensed practical nurses and registered nurses from 2024 to 2034 is approximately 3% and 5% annually, respectively.
tamClaims.sentence: Projected employment for licensed practical nurses and registered nurses is expected to grow by approximately 3% and 5% annually, respectively, from 2024 to 2034, according to the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics Occupational Outlook Handbook.

tamClaims.claim: The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics projects more than 200,000 job openings each year for nurses through 2034.
tamClaims.sentence: When factoring in the need to replace workers who transfer to different occupations or exit the labor force, such as to retire, the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics projects openings each year for nurses of more than 200,000 through 2034, though the amount of demand varies by geography.

tamClaims.claim: There were approximately 6.1 million veterans aged 18 to 54 in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. Bureau of Labor estimates that in 2025 there were approximately 6.1 million veterans aged 18 to 54.
